'''Klol fungus''' was a type of [[Fungus/Legends|fungus]] that grew<ref name="RC:HC" /> on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] and was present<ref name="RC:HC" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', which includes the appearance of klol fungus, in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> It grew quickly, appearing as a pale [[Color/Legends|pink]] mesh on fallen [[Tree/Legends|tree]] trunks in the span of a few [[Standard day/Legends|days]].<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Klol fungus appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|Hard Contact]]'', the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}}
